rulings.Case Title: SHARLINE COMPTON et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 19, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT PLANT PRODUCTS & SUPPLY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion denied. Plant and Beck declarations inadmissible, no personal knowledge. Failure to shift burden of proof. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, A VS. HEALTH PLAN OF SAN JOAQUIN, A PUBLICLY SPONSORED et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 19, 2009, line 11, DEFENDANT COUNTY OF SAN JOAQUIN, MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Motion to Strike is Granted. =(302/CWW/XLT)

rulings.Case Title: THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, A VS. HEALTH PLAN OF SAN JOAQUIN, A PUBLICLY SPONSORED et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 19, 2009, line 11, DEFENDANT COUNTY OF SAN JOAQUIN, DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Action is time barred. Plaintiff failed to file its complaint within two years of accural of the cause of action, November 24, 2005. January 20, 2006 letter is request for reconsideration of the earlier denial of claim, clearly indicating accural of cause of action for two year limitations period. Government Code sections 945.6(a)(2) and 901. =(302/CWW/XLT)
